languages.text: "Мне удалось найти упоминание некоего когитатора во дворце Даргонуса, а также инфоключа, открывающего доступ к его архивам".
"I found reference to a certain cogitator in the Palace of Dargonus, as well as a data-key that grants access to its archives."
languages.original_text: "Мне удалось найти упоминание некоего когитатора во дворце Даргонуса, а также инфоключа, открывающего доступ к его архивам".

traits.locale_text: "I found reference to a certain cogitator in the Palace of Dargonus, as well as a data-key that grants access to its archives."
"I found reference to a certain cogitator in the Palace of Dargonus, as well as a data-key that grants access to its archives."
"I found reference to a certain cogitator in the Palace of Dargonus, as well as a data-key that grants access to its archives."

languages.text: “我找到了一段关于达戈努斯宫殿中某台沉思者的记录，还有一个能访问其档案的数据密钥。”
languages.original_text: "I found reference to a certain cogitator in the Palace of Dargonus, as well as a data-key that grants access to its archives."

traits.locale_text: “我找到了一段关于达戈努斯宫殿中某台沉思者的记录，还有一个能访问其档案的数据密钥。”

languages.text: «He hallado alusiones a cierto cogitador del palacio de Dargonus, así como una llave de datos que otorga acceso a sus archivos».
languages.original_text: "I found reference to a certain cogitator in the Palace of Dargonus, as well as a data-key that grants access to its archives."

traits.locale_text: «He hallado alusiones a cierto cogitador del palacio de Dargonus, así como una llave de datos que otorga acceso a sus archivos».

languages.text: « J'ai découvert une référence à un certain cogitateur dans le palais de Dargonus, ainsi qu'à une clé de données donnant accès à ses archives. »
languages.original_text: "I found reference to a certain cogitator in the Palace of Dargonus, as well as a data-key that grants access to its archives."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai découvert une référence à un certain cogitateur dans le palais de Dargonus, ainsi qu'à une clé de données donnant accès à ses archives. »

languages.text: "Ich habe einen Verweis auf einen Cogitator im Palast von Dargonus gefunden ... und einen Datenschlüssel, der Zugang zu seinen Archiven gewährt."
languages.original_text: "I found reference to a certain cogitator in the Palace of Dargonus, as well as a data-key that grants access to its archives."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe einen Verweis auf einen Cogitator im Palast von Dargonus gefunden ... und einen Datenschlüssel, der Zugang zu seinen Archiven gewährt."

languages.text: "Dargonus Sarayı'ndaki belirli bir kavramsayara dair atıf ve arşivlerine erişim sağlayan bir veri anahtarı buldum."
languages.original_text: "I found reference to a certain cogitator in the Palace of Dargonus, as well as a data-key that grants access to its archives."

traits.locale_text: "Dargonus Sarayı'ndaki belirli bir kavramsayara dair atıf ve arşivlerine erişim sağlayan bir veri anahtarı buldum."

languages.text: 「ある思考者に関する記述と、そのアーカイブへのアクセス権を与えるデータキーを、ドラゴナス宮殿で見つけました」
languages.original_text: "I found reference to a certain cogitator in the Palace of Dargonus, as well as a data-key that grants access to its archives."

traits.locale_text: 「ある思考者に関する記述と、そのアーカイブへのアクセス権を与えるデータキーを、ドラゴナス宮殿で見つけました」
